attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SMOPL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) + MAX_VAL PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY,
       SMOPL.LINE_LOCATION_ID, SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
  FROM 
	(SELECT SPOLS.LINE_LOCATION_ID, NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
          FROM 
		(SELECT LINE_LOCATION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL

UNION ALL 
               SELECT LINE_LOCATION_ID, GLOBAL_NAME  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_AL ) SPOLS,


               $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
         WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SPOLS.GLOBAL_NAME) SMOPL,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT) SMPOL
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (          SELECT 1
            FROM $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT SPLS
           WHERE SPLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT  = SMOPL.LINE_LOCATION_ID
             AND SPLS.SS_CD = SMOPL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)

SELECT 
 SMPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY
,STEXPOLS.SHIPMENT_NUM AS BK_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NUMBER_INT
,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 
,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT 
,NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT
,NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,STEXPOLS.NEED_BY_DATE AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NEED_DT 
,STEXPOLS.PROMISED_DATE AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_PROMISED_DT 
,COALESCE(STEXPOLS.CLOSED_CODE ,'OPEN') AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_STATUS_CD
,COALESCE(STEXPOLS.CANCEL_FLAG,'N') AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_CANCEL_FLG 
,CAST (STEXPOLS.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE AS DATE) AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_LAST_ACCPT_DT
,COALESCE(STEXPOLS.PRICE_OVERRIDE,0) AS PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT
,COALESCE(STEXPOLS.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG ,'N') AS PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG 
,COALESCE(STEXPOLS.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG,'N') AS PO_INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLG 
,CASE  WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -99999
	WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -99998
	WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -99997
	WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -99996
  ELSE REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY  END AS PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY 
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG 
,CASE WHEN STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED,0) 
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_ACCEPTED_QTY 
,CASE WHEN STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_RECEIVED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_RECEIVED,0) 
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_RECEIVED_QTY 
,CASE WHEN STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_REJECTED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_REJECTED,0)
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_REJECTED_QTY 
,CASE WHEN  STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_BILLED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STEXPOLS.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_BILLED_QTY 
,NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY AS DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
,STEXPOLS.LINE_LOCATION_ID AS SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT 
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
COALESCE(STEXPOLS.ATTRIBUTE15,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_LOCATION_DESCR
,COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
,STEXPOLS.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE 
FROM
(
	SELECT
		SMPOLA.NEED_BY_DATE,
		SMPOLA.PROMISED_DATE,
		SMPOLA.CLOSED_CODE,
		SMPOLA.CANCEL_FLAG,
		SMPOLA.SHIPMENT_NUM,
		SMPOLA.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE,
		SMPOLA.PRICE_OVERRIDE,
		SMPOLA.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		SMPOLA.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		SMPOLA.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		SMPOLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED,
		SMPOLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED,
		SMPOLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED,
		SMPOLA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
		SMPOLA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SMPOLA.PO_HEADER_ID,
		SMPOLA.PO_LINE_ID,
		SMPOLA.ATTRIBUTE15,
		SMPOLA.ACTION_CODE,
		COALESCE(SMPOLA.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,-997) AS SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL SMPOLA
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
		EXPOL.NEED_BY_DATE,
		EXPOL.PROMISED_DATE,
		EXPOL.CLOSED_CODE,
		EXPOL.CANCEL_FLAG,
		EXPOL.SHIPMENT_NUM,
		EXPOL.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE,
		EXPOL.PRICE_OVERRIDE,
		EXPOL.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		EXPOL.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		EXPOL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		EXPOL.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED,
		EXPOL.QUANTITY_RECEIVED,
		EXPOL.QUANTITY_REJECTED,
		EXPOL.QUANTITY_BILLED,
		EXPOL.GLOBAL_NAME,
		EXPOL.PO_HEADER_ID,
		EXPOL.PO_LINE_ID,
		EXPOL.ATTRIBUTE15,
		EXPOL.ACTION_CODE,
		COALESCE(EXPOL.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,-999) AS SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS EXPOL
      where EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
) STEXPOLS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STEXPOLS.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT SMPOLS
	ON (SMPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT = STEXPOLS.LINE_LOCATION_ID
		AND SMPOLS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
	ON (NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = STEXPOLS.PO_HEADER_ID
		AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
	ON (NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = STEXPOLS.PO_LINE_ID
		AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
/* Added this join Condition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT =  STEXPOLS.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
/* End of Join Condition */
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY ,EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME,EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID
		 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL EPRL, 
		      $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL,
		      $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		 WHERE EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL
			AND (EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME) 
				NOT IN (SELECT LINE_LOCATION_ID ,GLOBAL_NAME
					FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL 
					WHERE LINE_LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL
					GROUP BY LINE_LOCATION_ID ,GLOBAL_NAME HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
			     )
			AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
			AND EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID=NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT
			AND NPRL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		) REQLKEY
	ON (REQLKEY.LINE_LOCATION_ID=STEXPOLS.LINE_LOCATION_ID 
		AND REQLKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXPOLS.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT 
 SMOPOLL.BATCH_ID                      
,SMOPOLL.APPROVED_DATE                 
,SMOPOLL.CANCEL_DATE                   
,SMOPOLL.CANCEL_FLAG                   
,SMOPOLL.CANCEL_REASON                 
,SMOPOLL.CANCELLED_BY                  
,SMOPOLL.CLOSED_CODE                   
,SMOPOLL.CLOSED_DATE                   
,SMOPOLL.CLOSED_REASON                 
,SMOPOLL.CREATED_BY                    
,SMOPOLL.CREATION_DATE                 
,SMOPOLL.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG      
,SMOPOLL.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE              
,SMOPOLL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SMOPOLL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SMOPOLL.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
,SMOPOLL.NEED_BY_DATE                  
,SMOPOLL.ORG_ID                        
,SMOPOLL.PO_HEADER_ID                  
,SMOPOLL.PO_LINE_ID                    
,SMOPOLL.PRICE_OVERRIDE                
,SMOPOLL.PROMISED_DATE                 
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY                      
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED             
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_BILLED               
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_RECEIVED             
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_REJECTED             
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_SHIPPED              
,SMOPOLL.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG         
,SMOPOLL.SHIPMENT_NUM                  
,SMOPOLL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           
,SMOPOLL.TAX_CODE_ID                   
,SMOPOLL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SMOPOLL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SMOPOLL.CREATE_DATETIME
,SMOPOLL.ATTRIBUTE15               
,SMOPOLL.ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
,SMOPOLL.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
FROM      
        (
	SELECT 
		 SMOPLLA.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMOPLLA.APPROVED_DATE                 
		,SMOPLLA.CANCEL_DATE                   
		,SMOPLLA.CANCEL_FLAG                   
		,SMOPLLA.CANCEL_REASON                 
		,SMOPLLA.CANCELLED_BY                  
		,SMOPLLA.CLOSED_CODE                   
		,SMOPLLA.CLOSED_DATE                   
		,SMOPLLA.CLOSED_REASON                 
		,SMOPLLA.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMOPLLA.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMOPLLA.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG      
		,SMOPLLA.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE              
		,SMOPLLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMOPLLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMOPLLA.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
		,SMOPLLA.NEED_BY_DATE                  
		,SMOPLLA.ORG_ID                        
		,SMOPLLA.PO_HEADER_ID                  
		,SMOPLLA.PO_LINE_ID                    
		,SMOPLLA.PRICE_OVERRIDE                
		,SMOPLLA.PROMISED_DATE                 
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY                      
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED             
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_BILLED               
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED             
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED             
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_SHIPPED              
		,SMOPLLA.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG         
		,SMOPLLA.SHIPMENT_NUM                  
		,SMOPLLA.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           
		,SMOPLLA.TAX_CODE_ID                   
		,SMOPLLA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMOPLLA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SMOPLLA.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SMOPLLA.ATTRIBUTE15
		,SMOPLLA.ACTION_CODE  
		,SMOPLLA.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL SMOPLLA             
	)SMOPOLL
WHERE
	(

	NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOPOLL.GLOBAL_NAME
			AND NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = SMOPOLL.PO_HEADER_ID
			AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOPOLL.GLOBAL_NAME
			AND NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = SMOPOLL.PO_LINE_ID
			AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	)
UNION ALL
SELECT 
 SMOPOLL.BATCH_ID                      
,SMOPOLL.APPROVED_DATE                 
,SMOPOLL.CANCEL_DATE                   
,SMOPOLL.CANCEL_FLAG                   
,SMOPOLL.CANCEL_REASON                 
,SMOPOLL.CANCELLED_BY                  
,SMOPOLL.CLOSED_CODE                   
,SMOPOLL.CLOSED_DATE                   
,SMOPOLL.CLOSED_REASON                 
,SMOPOLL.CREATED_BY                    
,SMOPOLL.CREATION_DATE                 
,SMOPOLL.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG      
,SMOPOLL.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE              
,SMOPOLL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,SMOPOLL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,SMOPOLL.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
,SMOPOLL.NEED_BY_DATE                  
,SMOPOLL.ORG_ID                        
,SMOPOLL.PO_HEADER_ID                  
,SMOPOLL.PO_LINE_ID                    
,SMOPOLL.PRICE_OVERRIDE                
,SMOPOLL.PROMISED_DATE                 
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY                      
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED             
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_BILLED               
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_RECEIVED             
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_REJECTED             
,SMOPOLL.QUANTITY_SHIPPED              
,SMOPOLL.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG         
,SMOPOLL.SHIPMENT_NUM                  
,SMOPOLL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           
,SMOPOLL.TAX_CODE_ID                   
,SMOPOLL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SMOPOLL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,SMOPOLL.CREATE_DATETIME               
,SMOPOLL.ACTION_CODE
,SMOPOLL.ATTRIBUTE15                   
,'LV' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
,SMOPOLL.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
FROM      
        (
	SELECT 
		 SMOPLLA.BATCH_ID                      
		,SMOPLLA.APPROVED_DATE                 
		,SMOPLLA.CANCEL_DATE                   
		,SMOPLLA.CANCEL_FLAG                   
		,SMOPLLA.CANCEL_REASON                 
		,SMOPLLA.CANCELLED_BY                  
		,SMOPLLA.CLOSED_CODE                   
		,SMOPLLA.CLOSED_DATE                   
		,SMOPLLA.CLOSED_REASON                 
		,SMOPLLA.CREATED_BY                    
		,SMOPLLA.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SMOPLLA.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG      
		,SMOPLLA.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE              
		,SMOPLLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SMOPLLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SMOPLLA.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
		,SMOPLLA.NEED_BY_DATE                  
		,SMOPLLA.ORG_ID                        
		,SMOPLLA.PO_HEADER_ID                  
		,SMOPLLA.PO_LINE_ID                    
		,SMOPLLA.PRICE_OVERRIDE                
		,SMOPLLA.PROMISED_DATE                 
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY                      
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED             
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_BILLED               
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED             
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED             
		,SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_SHIPPED              
		,SMOPLLA.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG         
		,SMOPLLA.SHIPMENT_NUM                  
		,SMOPLLA.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           
		,SMOPLLA.TAX_CODE_ID                   
		,SMOPLLA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SMOPLLA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SMOPLLA.CREATE_DATETIME
		,SMOPLLA.ATTRIBUTE15	
		,SMOPLLA.ACTION_CODE  
		,SMOPLLA.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_ALL SMOPLLA 
	WHERE      SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED > 99999999999.9999999  
		OR SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_BILLED > 99999999999.999999 
		OR SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED > 99999999999.999999
		OR SMOPLLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED > 99999999999.999999        
	)SMOPOLL

SELECT 
 SMPOLS.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY
,STECPLLAS.SHIPMENT_NUM AS BK_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NUMBER_INT
,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM 
,NPO.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_CREATE_DT 
,NPOL.BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT AS BK_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_NUM_INT
,NPOL.PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
,STECPLLAS.NEED_BY_DATE AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_NEED_DT 
,STECPLLAS.PROMISED_DATE AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_PROMISED_DT 
,COALESCE(STECPLLAS.CLOSED_CODE ,'OPEN') AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_STATUS_CD
,COALESCE(STECPLLAS.CANCEL_FLAG,'N') AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_CANCEL_FLG 
,CAST (STECPLLAS.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE AS DATE) AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_LAST_ACCPT_DT
,COALESCE(STECPLLAS.PRICE_OVERRIDE,0) AS PO_LINE_SHPMT_PRC_OVERRIDE_AMT
,COALESCE(STECPLLAS.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG ,'N') AS PO_LINE_RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLG 
,COALESCE(STECPLLAS.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG,'N') AS PO_INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLG 
,CASE  WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='MFG') THEN -99999
	WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='EMEA') THEN -99998
	WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='BV') THEN -99997
	WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='QTC') THEN -99996
  WHEN (REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY IS NULL AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='CG') THEN -99995
  ELSE REQLKEY.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY  END AS PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY 
,'N' AS SOURCE_DELETED_FLG 
,CASE WHEN STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED,0) 
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_ACCEPTED_QTY 
,CASE WHEN STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_RECEIVED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_RECEIVED,0) 
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_RECEIVED_QTY 
,CASE WHEN STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_REJECTED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_REJECTED,0)
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_REJECTED_QTY 
,CASE WHEN  STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_BILLED>99999999999.9999999 THEN 1
	ELSE COALESCE(STECPLLAS.QUANTITY_BILLED,0)
	END AS PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_BILLED_QTY 
,NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY AS DD_PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
,STECPLLAS.LINE_LOCATION_ID AS SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT 
,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AS SS_CD,
COALESCE(STECPLLAS.ATTRIBUTE15,'UNKNOWN') AS SERVICE_LOCATION_DESCR
,COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_TO_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
,STECPLLAS.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE 
FROM
(
	SELECT
		SCPLLA.NEED_BY_DATE,
		SCPLLA.PROMISED_DATE,
		SCPLLA.CLOSED_CODE,
		SCPLLA.CANCEL_FLAG,
		SCPLLA.SHIPMENT_NUM,
		SCPLLA.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE,
		SCPLLA.PRICE_OVERRIDE,
		SCPLLA.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		SCPLLA.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		SCPLLA.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		SCPLLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED,
		SCPLLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED,
		SCPLLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED,
		SCPLLA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
		SCPLLA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		SCPLLA.PO_HEADER_ID,
		SCPLLA.PO_LINE_ID,
		SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE15,
		SCPLLA.ACTION_CODE,
		COALESCE(SCPLLA.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,-997) AS SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_AL SCPLLA
	UNION ALL
	SELECT
		ECPLLA.NEED_BY_DATE,
		ECPLLA.PROMISED_DATE,
		ECPLLA.CLOSED_CODE,
		ECPLLA.CANCEL_FLAG,
		ECPLLA.SHIPMENT_NUM,
		ECPLLA.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE,
		ECPLLA.PRICE_OVERRIDE,
		ECPLLA.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		ECPLLA.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
		ECPLLA.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
		ECPLLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED,
		ECPLLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED,
		ECPLLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED,
		ECPLLA.QUANTITY_BILLED,
		ECPLLA.GLOBAL_NAME,
		ECPLLA.PO_HEADER_ID,
		ECPLLA.PO_LINE_ID,
		ECPLLA.ATTRIBUTE15,
		ECPLLA.ACTION_CODE,
		COALESCE(ECPLLA.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,-999) AS SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID /* Column Addition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_AL ECPLLA
      where EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
) STECPLLAS
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STECPLLAS.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$TRANSLATIONDB.SM_PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT SMPOLS
	ON (SMPOLS.SK_PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID_INT = STECPLLAS.LINE_LOCATION_ID
		AND SMPOLS.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
	ON (NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = STECPLLAS.PO_HEADER_ID
		AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL
	ON (NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = STECPLLAS.PO_LINE_ID
		AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
/* Added this join Condition as part of Q2FY16 SC CSE */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT =  STECPLLAS.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
/* End of Join Condition */
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY ,EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME,EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID
		 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL EPRL, 
		      $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL,
		      $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		 WHERE EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL
			AND (EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID,EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME) 
				NOT IN (SELECT LINE_LOCATION_ID ,GLOBAL_NAME
					FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL 
					WHERE LINE_LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL
					GROUP BY LINE_LOCATION_ID ,GLOBAL_NAME HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
			     )
			AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
			AND EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID=NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT
			AND NPRL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
		) REQLKEY
	ON (REQLKEY.LINE_LOCATION_ID=STECPLLAS.LINE_LOCATION_ID 
		AND REQLKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STECPLLAS.GLOBAL_NAME)

	)SCOPOLL
WHERE
	(

	NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCOPOLL.GLOBAL_NAME
			AND NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = SCOPOLL.PO_HEADER_ID
			AND NPO.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER_LINE NPOL, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
		WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCOPOLL.GLOBAL_NAME
			AND NPOL.SK_PO_LINE_ID_INT = SCOPOLL.PO_LINE_ID
			AND NPOL.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
	)
UNION ALL

 SCOPOLL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_CANCELLED,
 SCOPOLL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_RECEIVED,
 SCOPOLL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_REJECTED,
 SCOPOLL.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_SHIPPED,
 SCOPOLL.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
 SCOPOLL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID,
 SCOPOLL.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,
 SCOPOLL.SHIP_VIA_LOOKUP_CODE,
 SCOPOLL.SHIPMENT_CLOSED_DATE,
 SCOPOLL.SHIPMENT_NUM,
 SCOPOLL.SHIPMENT_TYPE,
 SCOPOLL.SOURCE_SHIPMENT_ID,
 SCOPOLL.START_DATE,
 SCOPOLL.SUPPLIER_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER,
 SCOPOLL.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE,
 SCOPOLL.TAX_CODE_ID,
 SCOPOLL.TAX_NAME,
 SCOPOLL.TAX_USER_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
 SCOPOLL.TAXABLE_FLAG,
 SCOPOLL.TERMS_ID,
 SCOPOLL.TRANSACTION_FLOW_HEADER_ID,
 SCOPOLL.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID,
 SCOPOLL.UNENCUMBERED_QUANTITY,
 SCOPOLL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE,
 SCOPOLL.UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CLASS,
 SCOPOLL.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
 SCOPOLL.VALUE_BASIS,
 SCOPOLL.VMI_FLAG,
 SCOPOLL.WORK_APPROVER_ID,
 'LV' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM      
        (
	SELECT 
		 SCPLLA.BATCH_ID                      
		,SCPLLA.APPROVED_DATE                 
		,SCPLLA.CANCEL_DATE                   
		,SCPLLA.CANCEL_FLAG                   
		,SCPLLA.CANCEL_REASON                 
		,SCPLLA.CANCELLED_BY                  
		,SCPLLA.CLOSED_CODE                   
		,SCPLLA.CLOSED_DATE                   
		,SCPLLA.CLOSED_REASON                 
		,SCPLLA.CREATED_BY                    
		,SCPLLA.CREATION_DATE                 
		,SCPLLA.INSPECTION_REQUIRED_FLAG      
		,SCPLLA.LAST_ACCEPT_DATE              
		,SCPLLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
		,SCPLLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
		,SCPLLA.LINE_LOCATION_ID              
		,SCPLLA.NEED_BY_DATE                  
		,SCPLLA.ORG_ID                        
		,SCPLLA.PO_HEADER_ID                  
		,SCPLLA.PO_LINE_ID                    
		,SCPLLA.PRICE_OVERRIDE                
		,SCPLLA.PROMISED_DATE                 
		,SCPLLA.QUANTITY                      
		,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED             
		,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_BILLED               
		,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_CANCELLED            
		,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED             
		,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED             
		,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_SHIPPED              
		,SCPLLA.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG         
		,SCPLLA.SHIPMENT_NUM                  
		,SCPLLA.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID           
		,SCPLLA.TAX_CODE_ID                   
		,SCPLLA.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
		,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
		,SCPLLA.CREATE_DATETIME               
		,SCPLLA.ACTION_CODE 
                ,SCPLLA.SHIPMENT_TYPE
                ,SCPLLA.OUTSOURCED_ASSEMBLY
                ,SCPLLA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
,SCPLLA.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE
,SCPLLA.PO_RELEASE_ID
,SCPLLA.SHIP_VIA_LOOKUP_CODE
,SCPLLA.ENCUMBERED_FLAG
,SCPLLA.ENCUMBERED_DATE
,SCPLLA.UNENCUMBERED_QUANTITY
,SCPLLA.FOB_LOOKUP_CODE
,SCPLLA.FREIGHT_TERMS_LOOKUP_CODE
,SCPLLA.TAXABLE_FLAG
,SCPLLA.TAX_NAME
,SCPLLA.ESTIMATED_TAX_AMOUNT
,SCPLLA.FROM_HEADER_ID
,SCPLLA.FROM_LINE_ID
,SCPLLA.FROM_LINE_LOCATION_ID
,SCPLLA.START_DATE
,SCPLLA.END_DATE
,SCPLLA.LEAD_TIME
,SCPLLA.LEAD_TIME_UNIT
,SCPLLA.PRICE_DISCOUNT
,SCPLLA.TERMS_ID
,SCPLLA.APPROVED_FLAG
,SCPLLA.CLOSED_FLAG
,SCPLLA.FIRM_STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE
,SCPLLA.FIRM_DATE
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE1
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE2
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE3
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE4
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE5
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE6
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE7
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE8
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE9
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE10
,SCPLLA.UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CLASS
,SCPLLA.ENCUMBER_NOW
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE11
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE12
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE13
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE14
,SCPLLA.ATTRIBUTE15
,SCPLLA.QTY_RCV_TOLERANCE
,SCPLLA.QTY_RCV_EXCEPTION_CODE
,SCPLLA.ENFORCE_SHIP_TO_LOCATION_CODE
,SCPLLA.ALLOW_SUBSTITUTE_RECEIPTS_FLAG
,SCPLLA.DAYS_EARLY_RECEIPT_ALLOWED
,SCPLLA.DAYS_LATE_RECEIPT_ALLOWED
,SCPLLA.RECEIPT_DAYS_EXCEPTION_CODE
,SCPLLA.INVOICE_CLOSE_TOLERANCE
,SCPLLA.RECEIVE_CLOSE_TOLERANCE
,SCPLLA.SHIP_TO_ORGANIZATION_ID
,SCPLLA.SOURCE_SHIPMENT_ID
,SCPLLA.REQUEST_ID
,SCPLLA.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
,SCPLLA.PROGRAM_ID
,SCPLLA.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
,SCPLLA.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
,SCPLLA.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT
,SCPLLA.RECEIVING_ROUTING_ID
,SCPLLA.ACCRUE_ON_RECEIPT_FLAG
,SCPLLA.CLOSED_BY
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19
,SCPLLA.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20
,SCPLLA.COUNTRY_OF_ORIGIN_CODE
,SCPLLA.TAX_USER_OVERRIDE_FLAG
,SCPLLA.MATCH_OPTION
,SCPLLA.CALCULATE_TAX_FLAG
,SCPLLA.CHANGE_PROMISED_DATE_REASON
,SCPLLA.NOTE_TO_RECEIVER
,SCPLLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY
,SCPLLA.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE
,SCPLLA.PREFERRED_GRADE
,SCPLLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_RECEIVED
,SCPLLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_ACCEPTED
,SCPLLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_REJECTED
,SCPLLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_CANCELLED
,SCPLLA.VMI_FLAG
,SCPLLA.CONSIGNED_FLAG
,SCPLLA.RETROACTIVE_DATE
,SCPLLA.SUPPLIER_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_RECEIVED
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_BILLED
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_CANCELLED
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_REJECTED
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_ACCEPTED
,SCPLLA.DROP_SHIP_FLAG
,SCPLLA.SALES_ORDER_UPDATE_DATE
,SCPLLA.TRANSACTION_FLOW_HEADER_ID
,SCPLLA.FINAL_MATCH_FLAG
,SCPLLA.MANUAL_PRICE_CHANGE_FLAG
,SCPLLA.SHIPMENT_CLOSED_DATE
,SCPLLA.CLOSED_FOR_RECEIVING_DATE
,SCPLLA.CLOSED_FOR_INVOICE_DATE
,SCPLLA.SECONDARY_QUANTITY_SHIPPED
,SCPLLA.VALUE_BASIS
,SCPLLA.MATCHING_BASIS
,SCPLLA.PAYMENT_TYPE
,SCPLLA.DESCRIPTION
,SCPLLA.WORK_APPROVER_ID
,SCPLLA.BID_PAYMENT_ID
,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_FINANCED
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_FINANCED
,SCPLLA.QUANTITY_RECOUPED
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_RECOUPED
,SCPLLA.RETAINAGE_WITHHELD_AMOUNT
,SCPLLA.RETAINAGE_RELEASED_AMOUNT
,SCPLLA.AMOUNT_SHIPPED
,SCPLLA.TAX_ATTRIBUTE_UPDATE_CODE
,SCPLLA.ORIGINAL_SHIPMENT_ID
,SCPLLA.LCM_FLAG
,SCPLLA.UDA_TEMPLATE_ID
,SCPLLA.DRAFT_ID
                  
	FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_PO_LINE_LOCATIONS_AL SCPLLA 
	WHERE      SCPLLA.QUANTITY_ACCEPTED > 99999999999.9999999  
		OR SCPLLA.QUANTITY_BILLED > 99999999999.999999 
		OR SCPLLA.QUANTITY_RECEIVED > 99999999999.999999
		OR SCPLLA.QUANTITY_REJECTED > 99999999999.999999        
	)SCOPOLL
